commit.message:
Refactor theme transition, layout padding, and server component for playlists (#33)

* refactor: separate route view transition from theme toggle animation

Scope theme toggle mask animation behind .theme-transition class so
route-level fade transitions can run independently without triggering
the Mandalorian mask effect.

* fix: move labs page padding to layout for consistency

Move py-20 from page to layout and remove duplicate container wrapper
so all lab sub-pages share the same vertical spacing.

* refactor: convert playlists to server component

Fetch Spotify playlists directly via getPlaylists() on the server
instead of round-tripping through useQuery → /api/spotify/playlists.
Leverages Next.js server-side data cache with revalidate: 3600.

* Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Remove empty wrapper div from labs page

fix: download E4B on FLAGSHIP devices in onboarding (#201)

* fix: download E4B on FLAGSHIP devices in onboarding

OnboardingViewModel now injects HardwareProfileDetector and exposes
preferredGemmaModel (E4B on FLAGSHIP ≥10GB, E2B otherwise).

OnboardingScreen uses startPreferredDownload() and shows the actual
model name in the download button label and progress row.

Fixes S23 Ultra (11GB RAM, FLAGSHIP) always downloading E2B.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(#195): apply AppCompat theme to RedirectUriReceiverActivity

AppAuth's RedirectUriReceiverActivity requires a Theme.AppCompat theme.
Our app uses a pure Material3/Compose theme so the activity crashed with
IllegalStateException on every OAuth redirect attempt, silently killing
the HuggingFace sign-in flow before the token exchange could happen.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: NickMonrad <nick@lab3.com.au>

commit.message:
Phase 1.5: SoundCloud HLS AAC 160kbps upgrade

- _select_audio_format() now returns (format, is_hls) tuple and considers
  HLS formats (m3u8/m3u8_native protocol), preferring higher bitrate HLS
  over lower bitrate HTTP when available
- New _download_hls_stream() downloads fMP4 segments via m3u8 library:
  init segment + media segments concatenated into valid .m4a
- download_url() branches between HLS and HTTP download paths
- Uses absolute_uri for proper relative URL resolution in manifests
- SoundCloud: AAC 160kbps (.m4a) instead of MP3 128kbps (.mp3)
- YouTube: unchanged (HTTP-only formats)
- No new dependencies (m3u8 already installed via tiddl)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
TOML encoder: prefer readable table sections over inline tables (#2649)

* Initial plan

* Fix TOML encoder to prefer readable table sections over inline tables

When converting from YAML/JSON to TOML, the encoder now always uses
readable TOML table section syntax ([section]) instead of compact inline
hash table syntax (key = { ... }), which better matches TOML's goal as
a human-focused configuration format.

Changes:
- decoder_toml.go: Mark inline TOML tables with FlowStyle so round-trips
  can be distinguished from YAML flow mappings
- encoder_toml.go:
  - encodeTopLevelEntry: use FlowStyle check instead of EncodeSeparate to
    decide inline vs table section (all block mappings now become tables)
  - encodeSeparateMapping: count FlowStyle children as attributes; use
    recursive encodeSeparateMapping for nested non-flow mappings
  - encodeMappingBodyWithPath: emit non-flow child mappings as sub-table
    sections instead of inline tables
- toml_test.go: add encode (YAML→TOML) test scenarios, update roundtrip
  expectations for inline tables (now expanded to table sections)

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/sessions/4824a219-6d5e-42e7-bca1-a8a277bf8c6a

Co-authored-by: mikefarah <1151925+mikefarah@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix TOML roundtrip: use TomlInline flag instead of FlowStyle to preserve inline tables

FlowStyle affected YAML decode output (causing inline tables to appear as
YAML flow mappings). Replace it with a new TOML-specific TomlInline bool
on CandidateNode that:
- Is set by the TOML decoder for inline tables (not FlowStyle)
- Is copied by UpdateAttributesFrom so it survives DeeplyAssign merges
- Is checked by the TOML encoder alongside FlowStyle (for YAML flow maps)
- Has no effect on the YAML encoder, preserving existing TOML→YAML output

TOML roundtrip tests are restored to their original expected values (inline
tables stay inline, table sections stay as sections).

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/sessions/f59bdf62-6d16-4664-991b-38eb87c9d81c

Co-authored-by: mikefarah <1151925+mikefarah@users.noreply.github.com>

* Refactor EncodeSeparate+TomlInline into a single EncodeHint enum

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/sessions/24db9a8f-601d-4ccf-ada7-129ed3226bb6

Co-authored-by: mikefarah <1151925+mikefarah@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix stale comment in hasStructuralChildren

commit.message:
fix(sync): harden atomic file writes

Route internal/sync append-only updates and internal/hooks settings writes through atomic temp-file replacement so delayed Close() failures, temp-file collisions, and partial writes do not report success. Preserve target file modes, clean up temp files, and normalize empty append-only inputs so merges do not introduce stray blank lines.

Add regression coverage for Close() handling, temp-file cleanup, destination preservation, permission preservation, and empty append-only merges.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Manuel Martinez <manmartgarc@gmail.com>

isMcpTool, normalizeMcpToolName, extractMcpServerName, extractCustomAgentName,
and getEditorNameFromRoot. All functions are pure string transformations so tests
use inline fixtures with no mocks.

Also fix a pre-existing bug discovered by the tests: extractCustomAgentName was
calling slice(0, -10) to strip '.agent.md' but that suffix is only 9 characters,
causing the last character of the agent name to be silently dropped.

commit.message:
fix(auth): trigger device re-auth when refresh token expires

When TokenRefreshMsg::Failed is received (refresh token expired or
server JWT secret rotated), the app now falls back to device signing-key
authentication instead of just showing an error status.

start_device_reauth() spawns a task calling authenticate_saved_session()
using the stored Ed25519 private key, then routes the result through
the existing AuthMsg::Success path which updates tokens, persists the
session, and restarts the orchestrator with a fresh access token.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add crash types 14-18: JavascriptInterface, NativeMethod, WorkManager, CustomView, KotlinObject + JitPack publishing setup

- Type 14: JAVASCRIPT_INTERFACE_STRIPPED — WebView @JavascriptInterface methods renamed by R8
  → JavaScript calls like window.bridge.getUserName() fail at runtime
- Type 15: NATIVE_METHOD_RENAMED — Class with JNI external methods renamed by R8
  → UnsatisfiedLinkError: native library JNI signatures no longer match
- Type 16: WORKMANAGER_WORKER_STRIPPED — Worker subclass renamed by R8
  → WorkManager ClassNotFoundException on job execution
- Type 17: CUSTOM_VIEW_STRIPPED — Custom View class renamed by R8
  → LayoutInflater InflateException: ClassNotFoundException
- Type 18: KOTLIN_OBJECT_INSTANCE_REMOVED — Kotlin object INSTANCE field removed/renamed by R8
  → NoSuchFieldError via reflection / objectInstance

New files:
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/models/WebBridgeHandler.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/models/ImageProcessor.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/models/DataSyncWorker.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/models/CustomProgressView.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/models/ConfigManager.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/crashes/JavascriptInterfaceCrash.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/crashes/NativeMethodCrash.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/crashes/WorkManagerCrash.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/crashes/CustomViewCrash.kt
- app/src/main/java/app/proguard/crashes/KotlinObjectCrash.kt
- proguard-protect-plugin/src/main/kotlin/.../analyzers/JavascriptInterfaceAnalyzer.kt
- proguard-protect-plugin/src/main/kotlin/.../analyzers/NativeMethodAnalyzer.kt
- proguard-protect-plugin/src/main/kotlin/.../analyzers/WorkManagerAnalyzer.kt
- proguard-protect-plugin/src/main/kotlin/.../analyzers/CustomViewAnalyzer.kt
- proguard-protect-plugin/src/main/kotlin/.../analyzers/KotlinObjectAnalyzer.kt
- jitpack.yml
- PUBLISH.md

Other changes:
- Add 5 new IssueType values to ProguardIssue.kt enum
- Register 5 new analyzers in PostBuildAnalysisTask.kt
- Add crossReferenceWithMapping handlers for all 5 new types
- Add HtmlReportGenerator icons and labels for new types
- Add maven-publish plugin to proguard-protect-plugin/build.gradle.kts
- Add androidx.work:work-runtime-ktx:2.9.0 to app dependencies
- Add commented-out fix rules in app/proguard-rules.pro for types 14-18
- Add 5 new crash buttons to MainActivity

- implement GET /auth/me using Bearer authentication\n- decode JWT access token and validate token subject\n- reject missing, invalid, or revoked tokens with 401\n- resolve authenticated user profile via AuthService.get_user_by_id\n- return 404 when token subject user is not found\n- add dedicated /me endpoint unit tests covering success and auth edge cases

* docs(changelog): add auth API implementation

- changelog for 2026-04-12
- document JWT token system with HS256 and key rotation support
- document complete auth workflow (signup, login, logout, profile)
- document token revocation using jti-based denylist

commit.message:
Preserve dsize across layout finalization for chained `[[no_unique_address]]` (#1235)

* Add chained no_unique_address regression

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/GregorGullwi/FlashCpp/sessions/26388c88-8f2a-4c21-842e-c6677e927452

Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>

* Resolve chained no_unique_address issue

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/GregorGullwi/FlashCpp/sessions/26388c88-8f2a-4c21-842e-c6677e927452

Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>

* Removed stddef.h include from test file

* Fix: update layout_data_size when adding vptr in finalize()

When has_vtable is true, total_size was incremented by 8 for the vptr
but layout_data_size was not. The new two-parameter finalizeLayoutSize()
passes layout_data_size as raw_layout_size, so the stale value caused
polymorphic structs to report an incorrect (too small) data extent.
This could allow [[no_unique_address]] tail-padding reuse to overlap
the vptr region with subsequent members.

* Preserve layout_data_size in recalculateLayout() and finalizeWithBases()

Pass the tracked layout_data_size (data extent) separately from
current_offset (object extent) so chained [[no_unique_address]]
tail-padding reuse works for structs with base classes.

* docs: document premature layout_is_complete invariant in KNOWN_ISSUES.md

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Gregor <gregor.gullwi@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: devin-ai-integration[bot] <158243242+devin-ai-integration[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: FlashCpp
repository.description: Flash C++ Compiler

commit.message:
Disambiguate elaborated type-specifier variable declarations from class/struct definitions (#1237)

* Add elaborated type specifier disambiguation for struct/class/union variable declarations

Adds looks_like_elaborated_type_variable_declaration() lookahead that disambiguates
between struct/class/union definitions (struct Foo { ... }) and elaborated type specifier
variable declarations (struct Foo f = { 1, 2 }) at both statement and top-level scope.

This fixes parsing of patterns like 'struct timespec __ts = { ... }' in <semaphore> and
similar local variable declarations in standard library headers.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/GregorGullwi/FlashCpp/sessions/809df1ad-d593-4f69-af00-fb4ce71a5507

Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update README_STANDARD_HEADERS.md with comprehensive retest results (2026-04-11)

- <span> now compiles successfully (was Codegen Error)
- <thread>, <semaphore>, <condition_variable>, <execution>, <generator>, <mutex>
  all improved from Parse Error/Crash to Compile/Codegen Error
- Updated all timings and error descriptions
- Noted regressions in <any>, <utility>, <exception>, <numeric>, etc.
- Identified stl_pair.h:308 swap as the single biggest remaining blocker

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/GregorGullwi/FlashCpp/sessions/809df1ad-d593-4f69-af00-fb4ce71a5507

Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>

* Apply elaborated type disambiguation in namespace body parsing

The top-level and statement-level paths were already patched, but the
namespace-body path at parse_namespace() was missing the same check.
Without this, 'struct Foo f;' inside a namespace body would still be
misparsed as a struct definition.

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: GregorGullwi <1397711+GregorGullwi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: devin-ai-integration[bot] <158243242+devin-ai-integration[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: correct AMS HT tray_id encoding in set_ams_filament_setting

AMS HT chip_id=128. Standard AMS tray_id = ams_id * 4 + slot, but
AMS HT tray_id = chip_id + slot (128 + slot). Previously produced 512
for slot 0 instead of the correct 128.

commit.message:
Fix: use next/server after() for Slack interaction background work

Fire-and-forget (.catch) doesn't work on Vercel — the serverless
function is killed immediately after the response, so the rating
was never saved, the message never updated, and the next item
never dispatched. Using after() keeps the function alive to
complete the work after returning 200 to Slack.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: address code review feedback on Phase 2 deliverables

- loki-config.yaml: Remove contradictory http_tls_config block; Loki
  binds to localhost only and TLS is terminated at the Nginx reverse
  proxy. Add clarifying comment to prevent future confusion.

- harbor README.md (backup script): Add NFS mountpoint validation before
  backup proceeds; add job drain loop (up to 5 minutes) before stopping
  Harbor services; replace unbounded find+rm -rf with a pattern-validated
  deletion loop restricted to date-format directory names.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Initial commit: BookVibe - personal book tracker

Features:
- Book CRUD with genre, status, star ratings, notes, page progress
- Amazing Bookstores section with photos, tags, ratings
- Statistics dashboard with genre and monthly charts
- Teen-friendly glassmorphism UI with animations
- JSON file storage, Node.js/Express backend
